details.test: Task 1: Fastest emergency home lockout under $120 within 30 minutes
Task 2: Rekey 3 locks next Saturday 10am–12pm with mid-range package
Task 3: Cheapest car lockout under $100 with 4+ stars for 2018 Toyota Corolla
Task 4: Quote for installing 1 smart lock with 4.2+ rating and 2 additional locks
Task 5: Membership under $20/month with at least 2 free emergency callouts and start enrollment
Task 6: Find a 24/7 locksmith serving ZIP and submit callback request
Task 7: Apply >=10% emergency promo and proceed to checkout
Task 8: Non-emergency lock repair tomorrow 2–4pm with Spanish-speaking locksmith
